raw_title: Paolo Angelini: DLT and stablecoins - where do we stand?
raw_content: Speech by Mr Paolo Angelini, Senior Deputy Governor of the Bank of Italy, at the International Economic Symposium "The global economy at an inflection point: technology, policy, and the future of growth", co-hosted by the Bank of Italy and National Association for Business Economics (NABE), Rome, 20 April 2026.
